zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol於大約1115年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼時，他的父親Geldouin de Dol42歲，母親Noga Enoguen de Tintèniac47歲。他於1131年與Basilia在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1162年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol于大约1115年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼时，他的父亲Geldouin de Dol42岁，母亲Noga Enoguen de Tintèniac47岁。他于1131年与Basilia在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉福雷斯结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1162年在英国英格兰可瓦爾享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dol,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Manjinder, Tarsem, Ajit, Anoop, Anup, Balwinder, Hardip, Jagroop, Navdeep, Sukhpal.
Indian (Punjab): Sikh name based on the name of a Jat clan, of unexplained etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol was born about 1115, in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Geldouin de Dol, was 42 and his mother, Noga Enoguen de Tintèniac, was 47. He married Basilia in 1131, in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died in 1162, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol est né environ 1115, à Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Geldouin de Dol, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Noga Enoguen de Tintèniac, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Basilia en 1131, à Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1162, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol um 1115 in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geldouin de Dol 42 und seine Mutter Noga Enoguen de Tintèniac 47. Er hat 1131 in Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich Basilia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb 1162 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol è nato il circa 1115 nel Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Geldouin de Dol, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Noga Enoguen de Tintèniac, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Basilia nel 1131, nel Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel 1162, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dolが約1115年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインドル-デ-ブレタグンで生まれた時，父Geldouin de Dolは42歳，母Noga Enoguen de Tintèniacは47歳であった。1131年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインフォウグeレスでBasiliaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1162年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol(이)가 대략 1115년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 도-데-브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geldouin de Dol(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Noga Enoguen de Tintèniac(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1131년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 포우그e레스에서 Basilia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1162년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol nasceu aproximadamente 1115, em Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Geldouin de Dol, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Noga Enoguen de Tintèniac, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Basilia em 1131, em Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1162, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol родился около 1115 г. в местности дол-де-бретагн, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Geldouin de Dol было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Noga Enoguen de Tintèniac, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Basilia в 1131 г. в местности фоугeресь, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер в 1162 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol nació aproximadamente 1115, en Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Geldouin de Dol, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Noga Enoguen de Tintèniac, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Basilia en 1131, en Fougères, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en 1162, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 48 años.
